name: AUTO-BID-INVITATION-TASKS — Sent Out Stage → Auto-Task Creation

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { hs_task_subject: $json.task_subject, hs_task_body: $json.task_body, hs_timestamp: $json.due_date_ms, hs_task_status: 'NOT_STARTED', hs_task_type: 'TODO' }, associations: [{ to: { id: $json.deal_id }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 27 }] }, { to: { id: $json.contact_id }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 204 }] }] }) }}

_hci_notes: AO-HS-004. Polls 3x daily on weekdays. Detects deals moved to Sent Out stage in last 4 hours. Fetches associated contacts. Creates follow-up task (due in 3 days) for each contact. Notifies via ntfy. Requires HUBSPOT_API_KEY.
